synopsis: Raised on hate, fear, and anger…steeped in the ways of darkness…and trained to kill! Darth Maul's time as apprentice to Darth Sidious has long been cloaked in shadows - but at last we will reveal his tale of revenge! It's a story of rage unleashed as Darth Maul prepares for his first encounter with the hated Jedi. But when a Jedi Padawan is captured by sinister forces, why is Maul so determined to find her? And what role will a band of bounty hunters, including Cad Bane and Aurra Sing, play? Get to know the galaxy's deadliest Zabrak like never before! COLLECTING: Star Wars: Darth
title: Darth Maul (2017)
